Simple Process

Learning in 3 Easy Steps

🔍
1

Browse & Choose

Explore live cultural classes by culture, language, or your child's age group.

📅
2

Book & Prepare

Pick a time, pay securely, and get everything you need in one confirmation email.

🌟

Learn & Grow

Join a live session from home. Watch your child laugh, sing, and fall in love with heritage.

Parent Stories

What Families Are Saying

👩🏿
★★★★★

"My daughter now greets our grandparents in Igbo and tells Tortoise stories to anyone who will listen. The connection this platform has created with our culture is beyond anything I expected."

Chidinma Okafor
Parent of Zara, age 5 · Lagos
Enrolled in: Tortoise & Eagle: Igbo Wisdom Tales
👨🏿

"As a Ghanaian father raising my son in the diaspora, Heritage Bridge Hub has been a lifeline. Baba Kofi makes my son laugh, clap, and learn — all in one session."

Kwame Asante
Parent of Kofi Jr., age 4 · Accra
👩🏿
★★★★★

"We're in London but my son has a real relationship with Yoruba culture now. The instructors are incredible — safe, vetted, passionate elders who genuinely love children."

Parent of Dami, age 3 · London (Diaspora)
🌍

In the Diaspora?

Raising African children in London, Houston, Toronto, or Dubai? Heritage Bridge Hub connects them to authentic culture — no matter where they are.

🇳🇬 Nigeria🇬🇭 Ghana🇬🇧 UK Diaspora🇺🇸 USA Diaspora🇨🇦 Canada🇦🇪 UAE

How It Works

Simple, Safe, and Magical

Heritage Bridge Hub is built to be easy for both families and elder instructors.

👨‍👩‍👧
1

Create a family profile

Sign up and add your child's age, interests, and language preferences. Takes 2 minutes.

🔍
2

Discover cultural classes

Browse verified elder instructors by culture, language, or skill category.

📅
3

Book a session

Choose a time that works for you. Join live via video — no downloads needed.

🌟
4

Watch your child flourish

Track progress, collect cultural achievements, and see your child fall in love with heritage.

📝
1

Apply as an instructor

Tell us about yourself, your skills, and the knowledge you want to share with children.

✅
2

Get verified & onboarded

Our team helps you set up your profile, equipment, and first class curriculum. All in 3 days.

🗓️
3

Teach on your schedule

Set your own hours, class sizes, and prices. We handle booking and payments completely.

💰
4

Earn & leave a legacy

Get paid weekly (Fridays) while preserving your culture for the next generation. You keep 75%.

We Take Child Safety Seriously

🔍

Background Verification

Every instructor undergoes identity verification, reference checks, and community vouching before approval.

📹

Monitored Sessions

All sessions are recorded for safety. Parents can join or observe any class at any time.

🚨

Report System

Simple one-tap reporting. Our safety team reviews all incidents within 2 hours.

💬

No Private Messaging

Instructors cannot privately message children. All communication goes through the parent.

👨‍👩‍👧

Parent Always Present

We encourage parents to sit nearby. Classes are designed for the parent-child experience together.

🔒

Privacy Compliant

We follow international children's online privacy standards to protect every child on our platform.

Frequently Asked Questions

What age are the classes designed for? ↓
All classes are designed for children ages 2–7. Classes for ages 2–4 are 15–20 minutes with simpler activities. Ages 5–7 classes run 25–35 minutes with more structured learning.
Can my child join if they don't speak the cultural language? ↓
Absolutely! Most classes are taught in English with cultural language woven in naturally. Children learn words, phrases, and proverbs — no prior knowledge needed.
How do I know the instructors are safe? ↓
Every instructor is verified by our team. We check identity documents, call references, and require community vouching. All sessions are recorded and parents can monitor any class.
Can I get a refund if I miss a session? ↓
Yes — if you cancel at least 24 hours before the session, you'll receive a full credit. Missing sessions without notice may not be eligible for refunds but we review each case individually.
Simple Pricing

Invest in Cultural Roots

Every plan includes a free first class. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts.

Legacy

₦25,000 / month
⚡ Unlimited classes

✓ 2 private 1-on-1 sessions/month

Every new family gets one complimentary class. No credit card needed to start.
